mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tiktok_cost_records ( promotion_id, account_id, account_name, balance, campaign_name, cost, impressions, record_time ) VALUES ( #{promotionId}, #{accountId}, #{accountName}, #{balance}, #{campaignName}, #{cost}, #{impressions}, #{recordTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE account_id = VALUES(account_id), account_name = VALUES(account_name), balance = VALUES(balance), campaign_name = VALUES(campaign_name), cost = VALUES(cost), impressions = VALUES(impressions), created_at = created_at
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tiktok_cost_records WHERE promotion_id = #{promotionId} ORDER BY record_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT promotion_id AS promotionId, COALESCE(MAX(cost) - MIN(cost), 0) AS dayCost, COALESCE(MAX(impressions), 0) AS maxImpressions, MAX(account_id) AS accountId FROM tiktok_cost_records WHERE DATE(record_time) = #{date} GROUP BY promotion_id
